positive: A whimsical and abstract depiction of interconnected nature cycles. A central, stylized, monolithic tree with roots forming intricate geometric patterns, glowing softly with bioluminescent blue and emerald green. Surrounding the tree are floating geometric elements representing seasons and natural elements: stylized swirling wind, falling crystalline petals, and crystalline water droplets. The composition should be highly symmetric and centered, utilizing bold, clean silhouettes for maximum print visibility. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with clean, minimalist geometric abstract art. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast backlighting emphasizing the glowing elements. Color: Limited palette of deep indigo, teal, forest green, and luminous cyan. Aspect Ratio: Square, perfectly centered for apparel print.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, faded, grain, messy, detailed background, photo-realistic, photorealism
